# MCP Echo Server Tool Test
# Tests the echo tool functionality with various messages

# Build the echo server binary
go build -o mcp-echo-server .

# Test basic echo with simple message
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"Hello World"}},"id":2}
EOF

# Verify echo response structure
stdout '"echo":"Hello World"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test echo with longer message
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"This is a longer message to test the echo functionality with more text"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"This is a longer message to test the echo functionality with more text"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test echo with special characters
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"Special chars: !@#$%^&*()_+{}[]|\\:;\"'<>?,./"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"Special chars: !@#$%^&*()_+{}[]|\\:;\"'\'<>?,./"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test echo with Unicode characters
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"Unicode: 你好世界 🌍 🚀 ñáéíóú"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"Unicode: 你好世界 🌍 🚀 ñáéíóú"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test echo with numbers
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"Numbers: 123 456.789 -42"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"Numbers: 123 456.789 -42"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test echo with JSON-like content
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"{\"nested\":\"json\",\"array\":[1,2,3]}"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"{\"nested\":\"json\",\"array\":[1,2,3]}"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test echo with single character
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"A"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"A"'
stdout '"timestamp"'

# Test multiple echo calls in sequence
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"First message"}},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"Second message"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"echo","arguments":{"message":"Third message"}},"id":4}
EOF

stdout '"echo":"First message"'
stdout '"echo":"Second message"'
stdout '"echo":"Third message"'
